caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold lettering sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a dark desk featuring a professional microphone on a boom arm and a blue and red mug with "THE TALK OUT" text. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a logo with five stars and the words "UNIQUE HUSTLE" repeated vertically. In the background, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!" and "TALK 101". The man's expression is attentive as he looks toward someone off-camera. Across the sequence, he remains seated, slightly shifting his gaze and gesturing with his right hand, which sports a gold watch. A small logo with a microphone icon and "TALK" text is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene.
